title: Rich Smoky Croatian Olive Skewers
description: A light and springy Croatian dish featuring smoky olives, this recipe is perfect for a snack or appetizer. It is gluten-free friendly and has a rich flavor profile.

ingredients.name: pitted green olives
ingredients.notes: preferably Cerignola or other large green olives

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic, parsley, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pitted green olives to the bowl and toss to coat with the smoky oil mixture.
Thread 2-3 olives onto each wooden skewer.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they have a nice char.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving.
